# Global Traps — Cross-Project Patterns

This file is auto-populated by `lesson-extractor` and `session-learner`.

Format: `GT-[CATEGORY]-[N]`

Categories: CI · GH · DB · EF · ARCH · CC · VERCEL · BUGBOT

---

## How this works

Every time you fix a bug and commit with `Fix:` prefix, `lesson-extractor` reads the commit and adds a trap entry here automatically. The same mistake never happens twice across any of your projects.

After your first few sessions, this file will start filling up with patterns specific to your stack.
